title: pelargonium longiflorum
intro: Pelargonium longiflorum, also known as the Cape Rose Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium longiflorum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, and soothe digestive issues, among others. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
